content.en:
It is not difficult to fuse the Forbidden Dao with the Endless Dao, it only needs to wrap the Forbidden Dao with the power of the Origin to fuse with the Endless Dao, and this process consumes the power of the Origin very much.

But once it succeeded, the origin power contained in Ye Tian's supreme Dao source would also become the power of the forbidden origin.

At that time, Ye Tian's speed of refining the forbidden body would be much faster, and he could even use the power of the forbidden origin to refine the forbidden body, the speed was many times faster than before, and it was even expected that the forbidden body would be tempered to the extent of six out of nine before becoming a Dao Ancestor.

Once he breaks through to the realm of Dao Ancestor, the degree of refining of the forbidden body will also skyrocket, and he will directly break the shackles of Xiaocheng to Dacheng, and directly refine the forbidden body to the Dacheng realm, and maybe directly approach the forbidden body of eighty percent.

What is this concept?

Some half-step domain ancestors' attainments in the forbidden body have just been completed, and it is conceivable how rebellious it is for the Supreme Dao Ancestor to fuse the forbidden Dao.

But Ye Tian's experience is almost impossible to replicate, so others can't envy it.

In order to speed up the fusion of the Forbidden Dao and the Endless Dao, Ye Tian paid a huge price to arrange a 100,000-fold time acceleration, and it was a time array arranged at the cost of forbidden strange things, and he only needed to replenish the forbidden strange things regularly.

This is very costly for forbidden strange things, but there are many forbidden strange things on Ye Tian's body, so there is no need to use them in vain.

In this way, Ye Tian used the power of the Origin to promote the compatibility of the Forbidden Dao and the Endless Dao day by day in the 100,000-fold Time Array.

One year in the outside world, one hundred thousand years inside the time array, almost one thousandth of a year.

Finally, a thousand years had passed in the outside world, and Ye Tian had finally completed the fusion of the Forbidden Dao and the Endless Dao.

this day.

Ye Tian ushered in a transformation!

Bang!!!!

The Forbidden Dao and the Endless Dao quickly transformed into the Endless Forbidden Dao, and the Supreme Dao Source also began to transform into the Forbidden Supreme Dao Source, and countless forbidden origin powers escaped, frantically refining Ye Tian's forbidden body.

Originally, Ye Tian's forbidden body had always stayed at the level of sixty percent, but now it quickly broke through to the progress of sixty percent.

The forbidden body is constantly being refined, and the effect of improvement is far greater than before.

It's a pity that Ye Tian's True Ancestor's power, physical power, and soul power have reached the extreme of the Supreme True Ancestor, so there is no way to improve it anymore.

But Ye Tian was shocked to find that his soul was getting stronger and stronger, and it contained forbidden attributes.

In this way, it will be more difficult for others to annihilate his soul, unless the difference in strength is really too great.

This metamorphosis took ten years to complete.

Xuanxu Ancient Realm, Huoyan Forbidden Land.

Ye Tian came here again, he came here to test the moves, because the space here is very stable and will not cause any damage.

"Forbidden Spear!"

A forbidden spear emerged, and wisps of endless forbidden dao power wrapped the forbidden spear, and immediately stabbed fiercely into the void in front of him.

Poof!

The void was pierced as if it had been pierced into tofu.

"The power is terrifying, the power of this blow is comparable to the power of my Ten Thousand Evil True Spear!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This is just a condensed forbidden spear, if he holds a forbidden weapon and fights the enemy in close quarters, how terrifying it will be!

"It's time to create a forbidden weapon, you can't have a forbidden weapon for your son, I don't have a forbidden weapon yet!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It just so happened that he had previously obtained a long stick forbidden treasure, which was the best forbidden weapon embryo.

Originally, he wanted to make a knife, but the Forbidden Arcana of the Long Stick type was the best way to craft a spear-type weapon.

Moreover, for him who has mastered the forbidden way, there is no difference between the way of the sword and the way of the gun, and mastering the way of the forbidden is equivalent to mastering all the rules, the way of the supreme sword, the way of the supreme sword, the way of the supreme gun...... The Great Dao is just an evolutionary branch of the Forbidden Dao.

Therefore, for Ye Tian, whether he used a spear or a long knife had no effect on his strength.

"Then let's create a spear-type forbidden weapon, it just so happens that I have been using the forbidden spear for a long time, and I can also use the forbidden weapon of the forbidden spear class!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After going back.

Ye Tian took out the forbidden treasure of the long stick, and took out a large number of materials and a lot of forbidden and strange materials, and began to create forbidden weapons.

If it was before, Ye Tian would have worked hard to build a forbidden weapon, but now that he has mastered the complete forbidden dao, and formed an endless forbidden dao, the supreme dao source is born with the power of the forbidden origin, and he can easily refine and quench the essence of the forbidden strange thing, so as to integrate it into the forbidden treasure of the long stick class.

In this way, each piece of material refining was integrated into the long stick taboo, and slowly turned into a spear, containing powerful taboo rules and taboo origins.

Year after year—

It took Ye Tian three thousand years to build a forbidden weapon, and it was a medium forbidden weapon as soon as it was born, much more powerful than the low-grade forbidden weapons in the hands of Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue.

The forbidden weapon has been created, and the name has not yet been chosen.

"Let's call you the Sky Slayer Spear!"

Ye Tian came up with a name at random and muttered.

Wow!

The three taboo rules are printed on the body of the spear of the Sky Killing Spear, which are the three taboo words of the 'Heaven Killing Spear'.

This Heaven Killing Spear made Ye Tian's strength increase again, and it directly skyrocketed by about thirty percent.

Forbidden weapons are not considered their own strength, so even if Ye Tian is about to reach the Supreme True Ancestor extreme, it can also increase its combat power by three percent.

"My strength is about to reach the extreme, at present, the forbidden body has been tempered to the level of sixty percent five, it is estimated that it will not be long before it can reach sixty percent nine, this is also the extreme of the forbidden body of the Supreme True Ancestor!

Ye Tian muttered to himself.

-----------------

The rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm have become stronger and stronger recently, and the entire Ancient Realm has also had a tendency to expand.

Many powerhouses realized that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was about to be promoted to the Ancient Realm, and they were immediately shocked one by one.

After all, how long has it only been since the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was about to be promoted?

Those Dao Ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm were even more panicked, they originally thought that it would take a long time for the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to be promoted, so they were not afraid of the forces of those Vast Sea Realms.

But now, once the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is promoted, those Dao Ancestors will not be restricted.

Wouldn't they be miserable?
